title: codazzia nervosa
side_effects: Codazzia nervosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing excessive nervousness, anxiety, and insomnia due to its high levels of stimulants. In severe cases, prolonged use can lead to heart palpitations, high blood pressure, and an increased risk of heart attacks. Additionally, improper use of codazzia nervosa can cause digestive issues, such as stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea. Long-term misuse may also result in an increased risk of addiction and dependence on the plant's stimulant properties.
